benchmark: W2 calibration - independent LLM judge re-scoring (claude-sonnet-4-6 via llmhub relay)
judgeFamily: anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-6) via api.llmhub.com.cn relay (OpenAI-compatible); distinct from the deepseek subject
subject: deepseek-chat (the W2 ablation responses being re-judged)

directionalClaim.claim: sophia-full fabricates LESS than raw-model (the gated pipeline reduces fabrication)

interpretation: An independent Claude judge (distinct family from the deepseek subject) CONFIRMS THE DIRECTION of the anti-fabrication claim: it rates sophia-full LOWER fabrication (0.1111) than raw-model (0.1389). However this does NOT meet the validation bar: inter-judge agreement between the deterministic scorer and Claude is kappa=-0.03 (bar >=0.40), i.e. essentially no agreement on ABSOLUTE labels. The disagreement is on what counts as 'fabricated' for contested-attribution answers. The directional effect under Claude is also SMALL (delta -0.028 vs the scorer's -0.111). Net: this is a single-family DIRECTIONAL data point that does not upgrade the existing validated result (calibration-multijudge-corroborated-2026-06-22, openai:gpt-4o + claude-sonnet-4-6 at kappa=0.74).
honestCaveats: Only ONE independent judge family available; the validation bar is >=2 families with kappa>=0.40.

RELAY FIDELITY: the same model id achieved scorer-vs-judge kappa=0.74 on 2026-06-22 but kappa=-0.03 here. A 6/6 factual-classification probe passed (relay not broken), but behavior drift on the nuanced abstain task cannot be fully ruled out. The relay is an untrusted third-party endpoint with no model-version control.
Relay is http-redirected-to-https to an untrusted operator; the API key was pasted in chat = compromised; rotate after use.
The pack is self-authored; judge is distinct from subject but the relay caveat bounds the independence.
relationToPriorEvidence: Does NOT supersede calibration-multijudge-corroborated-2026-06-22 (the high-water validated result). A directional re-confirmation on a fresh family via a relay, weaker than the prior direct-API result due to the relay fidelity caveat and sub-bar kappa.
